scripts.setup: bun install && bun install --cwd backend && bun install --cwd frontend
scripts.dev:backend:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans health
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd frontend build
scripts.smoke:seed: DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./data/smoke-health.sqlite} ./scripts/run-bun.sh --cwd backend src/migrate.ts --fresh && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./data/smoke-health.sqlite} ./scripts/run-bun.sh --cwd backend src/user-cli.ts create --email=smoke@example.com --password=Password123 --name=Smoke || true
scripts.smoke:serve: bun run build && HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=${PORT:-5555} DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./data/smoke-health.sqlite} ./scripts/run-bun.sh --cwd backend src/server.ts
